findings.issue: 差分バックアップ definition omits '修正（変更）されたデータ' — only mentions newly added, missing modified data. Contradicts p432 definition.
findings.evidence: フルバックアップ以降、新たに追加されたデータをバックアップすること

findings.issue: 差异备份 ZH definition omits modified data — only says 新增. Contradicts p432 ZH definition.
findings.evidence: 备份完全备份以后新增的数据

findings.issue: Differential Backup EN definition omits 'modified' — only mentions 'newly added'. Contradicts p432 EN definition.
findings.evidence: Back up data newly added since the full backup

findings.issue: 増分バックアップ p433 definition omits '修正' (modified) — only says 新たに追加. Contradicts p432 which includes 変更（追加・修正）.
findings.evidence: 前回のバックアップから新たに追加されたデータのみをバックアップすること

findings.issue: アクセシビリティ JP definition uses '制御なく' (without control) but EN says 'without restriction' (制限なく). Likely mistranslation/OCR confusion; standard phrasing is '制限なく'.
findings.evidence: 高齢者や障害者を含む、すべての人がサービスを制御なく使える度合い

findings.entity_id: itpassport_r6::term::p433::4 (レプリケーション) vs itpassport_r6::term::p437::0 / p439::1 (複写)
findings.issue: ZH surface collision: both レプリケーション (Replication, p433) and 複写 (Copy, p437/p439) are rendered as '复制'. These are distinct IT concepts. レプリケーション should use '数据复制' or '复制（同步）' to disambiguate.
findings.evidence: レプリケーション.zh='复制'; 複写.zh='复制'

findings.issue: 情報デザイン ZH uses '充斥' (connotes flooding/overcrowding, slightly negative) where JP '溢れる' is neutral/positive. Suggest '充斥' → '充满' or '大量存在' for register parity.
findings.evidence: 是一种整理生活中充斥的各种信息，并以易于理解的方式传达给对方的方法。

findings.issue: p435 spreadsheet terms '列' and '行' carry DB-terminology parentheticals in ZH '列（属性）'/'行（记录）' and EN 'Column (Attribute)'/'Row (Record)'. In a spreadsheet context, these DB labels may confuse learners. JP source surface has no such parentheticals. Verify intentionality.
findings.evidence: 列.zh='列（属性）', 行.zh='行（记录）'; JP table cells say '列'/'行' without parentheticals.

summary: 8 findings (5 ERROR, 3 WARN). No U+FFFD, no kana-in-ZH, no duplicate markers. Key issues: (1) p433 差分/増分 definitions omit '修正'(modified) — contradicts p432 accurate definitions [F001-F004]; (2) ZH surface collision: レプリケーション and 複写 both render as '复制' [F006]; (3) アクセシビリティ JP uses '制御なく' vs EN 'without restriction' (制限なく) [F005]; (4) p435 列/行 carry DB parentheticals '(属性)/(記録)' not present in JP source [F008]. L2 encoding clean.
